feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to monitor memory in SAP HANA Cloud with SAP HANA Cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to find the appropriate Alerts for SAP HANA Cloud memory in SAP HANA Cockpit like Alert ID 43, but we cannot find Alert ID 43 in HANA Cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

When working with SAP HANA Calculation Views perfromance optimization, how do you figure out where the performance is slow or what is causing it? 

I am currently learning on this concept but always my question is, how do we actually know where the performance is poor? On what basis can we say that the performance of a calculation view is bad?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud SAP HANA, express edition 

Best Regards,

Vikram Kamvar

entry.title: SAP BTP: How to set up alert on database resident memory and database used memory
entry.content:
We need help.
We are currently using SAP BTP and are looking for a way to automatically monitor the memory used in the database (database resident memory, database used memory), and send an alert and email when a certain amount of usage is detected.

Here are the specifications:

  • Using HANA Cloud as the database.
  • Currently, each memory is manually monitored from the Memory Usage section in HANA Cockpit.

Since the memory we want to set alerts for is standard, I thought there might be a default alert function, so I looked in HANA Cockpit under alert > alert definition, but I couldn't find it.

I would like to know if this is something that should be implemented by default in the alert definition, or if it is something that users need to create. If we need to create the alert, please let us know the steps to do so (preferably without using SQL commands, if possible).

entry.title: Get individual primary key values from CDHDR table
entry.content:
Dear all

In CDHDR table, there is a TABKEY column. That column stores the primary key columns concatenated value.

For example, for BSEG, it is something like this -

508123477777777702024666

I realised the pattern falls under this category -

MANDT(3 digits)||BUKRS(4 digits)||BELNR(10 digits)||GJAHR(4 digits)||BUZEI(3 digits)

Now, I like to get the individual column values from the concatenated value. I read in few blogs that there could be a mapping table that helps us to have this logic at scale for several other tables as well like MARA.

Appreciate if you can share with me the SQL query that could translate this mapping at scale for 1000s of SAP tables.

Please note I have replicated from SAP ERP CDPOS & CDHDR tables into Databricks. So, I have to get this logic (SQL query to get primary key columns names in a particular order, then get the individual values from the concatenated TABKEY value based on their positions & length) implemented within Databricks only...

Appreciate any support in this matter 

Br,

Noor.

entry.title: Setup Approval Process for Sales Order in S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi community and all experts,

I would like to seek some help in setting up the approval process for Sales Order with a Net Value Condition. I've tried but the approval process doesn't kick in when the order reached or exceed that limit.

This is what I've setup so far in the system.

1st, i define the approval request in the configurations.

2nd, i setup the workflow for sales order with a net amount condition.

3rd, i created a custom logic for the workflow.

I've also checked to make sure the workflow scenario is activated.

However, my test Sales Order didn't trigger the approval process that I've setup.

May i ask what have i missed or could it be my setup is wrong?

Thank you very much for all guidance.

Best Regards,

Dan

entry.title: API to get details of purchase order changes in S4 Hana public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am looking for API which gives list of  changes in Purchase order

Regards 

C Rao

entry.title: is there any APIs are available for HANA to Park the invoice?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is there any APIs are available for Parking the invoice

 

Thanks

entry.title: Add custom fields to SAP Cloud Bill Of Lading "TM_US_BILL_LADING" form
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add fiew fields to the bill of lading form under SAP Cloud environment.

To be able to add those fields we probably have to create custom fields and associating it to the right business object.

But we have not find any where to associate the new custom fields to be able to see it in the FDP_TM_CMR_SRV service.

 

What are the step to be able to add custom fields to the Bill Of lading form?

Regards

Daniel

entry.title: Query to create draft for a child entity in composition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using CAP(Node.js) odata V4 & listReport page template with fiori elements. I have two entities Lets say parent & child, they have a composition relation between them. The child entity table is displayed on the object page and there i have added a custom action button which opens a valuehelp dialog and there user can add multiple entries from the value valuehelp. The reason custom button was added was that it enables the user to add multiple entries in one go and he doesnt have to create it one by one using the create button. When you try to create an entry in child table using create button the call that is sent is this : 

NEW Parent(ID=123,IsActiveEntity=false)/child
i want to replicate this call. I tried using the following but it didnt work :
await this.send({
            query: INSERT.into(`Parent(ID=${req.params[0].ID},IsActiveEntity=false)/child`).entries(data),
            event: "NEW ",
        });
Any ideas how to solve this ?

entry.title: Is there an Internal Order field available in S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Solved: Internal order in S4HANA Public Cloud 3SL - SAP Community

The above thread seems to suggest that Internal orders are available in Public Cloud just without the same variations that there were in the past. 

Is this indeed the case and if so can I please be provided with some config specs on said field?

entry.title: ZDM DB Upgrades and CAP Multitenancy
entry.content:
We have a multitenant app and currently as suggested in the CAP documentation we use blue-green deploy to upgrade all tenants using the 'cds-mtx upgrade' task on idle start of the sidecar. 

hooks:
  - name: upgrade-all
    type: task
    phases:
      - blue-green.application.before-start.idle
    parameters:
      name: upgrade
      memory: 512M
      disk-quota: 768M
      command: cds-mtx upgrade '<<?>>'

CAP docs -> multitenancy -> update-database-schema 

Doing a normal 'cf deploy' we notice that the sidecar is stopped if one of the tenant DB upgrades fails meaning downtime for all, the sidecar is needed for the app to work.

This is a win in that we don't want to have a service relying on a DB column change that never happened. But its not ideal as the service is down for all.

Using the Blue-Green cf deploy will stop the idle service from becoming active if one of the tenant DB upgrades fails. Even better the old service is still active.

We assume there is automatic rollback for partially completed DB deployments (DB artifacts / i18n / data)!

But to be sure we want to have more control over the DB upgrade process, in case of failures.

What we would like to investigate something like the legacy blue-green CF MTA Deploy had, where we could use the Zero Downtime Maintenance (ZDM) HDI deployer.

The advantage with ZDM Deployment working with Blue-Green it handles updates gracefully by creating a new container and treating access and data changes separately only making the new container active when everything is successful.

Zero-Downtime Maintenance with Multi-Target Applications

Unfortunately, it doesn't work. Here is what we tried

  # --------------------- SIDECAR MODULE -----------------------
  - name: killerapp-mtx-sidecar
    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    type: nodejs
    path: mtx/sidecar
    requires:
      - name: app-api
        properties:
          SUBSCRIPTION_URL: ~{app-protocol}://\${tenant_subdomain}-~{app-uri}
          HDI_DEPLOY_MODE: ZDM   
          HDI_DEPLOY_OPTIONS: { "verbose": true, "trace": true }

HDI_DEPLOY_OPTIONS are mapped ok

HDI_DEPLOY_MODE: ZDM is ignored

the sidecar code cds-mtxs -> srv -> plugins -> hana looks like HDI_DEPLOY_MODE is deleted and not mapped back.

is the HDI ZDMDeployer not supported or not needed anymore, overkill here, ZDM still used other places?

It's often desired to update the whole service in a zero downtime manner. This section doesn't deal with the details about updating a service productively, but describes tool support the CAP Java SDK offers to update tenants.

CAP docs -> Java -> multitenancy -> database update 

The above statement makes me feel there is a bit more to doing it properly.

Ultimately what we are looking for is advice here, what is the best practice in case of DB failures, what could go wrong, how to mitigate and automate as much as possible?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Is it possible to switch my CDS view (odata v2) for POs to OData v4?
entry.content:
I'll explain why I ask.
I have OData v2 CDS view (YY1_POWithHistory) for POs and its service (YY1_POWITHHISTORY_CDS).
I can get data via HTTP request:
sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_POWITHHISTORY_CDS/YY1_POWithHistory

I can get all POs via OData 4 request:
sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder

but my OData 2 views are inaccessible  of course via this request.

entry.title: Call stored HANA procedure with table type parameters from NodeJS on XSA
entry.content:
PROCEDURE "xsa.procedures::SAVE_AAA" (
    IN zzz "xsa.tabletypes::ZzzTableType",
    IN yyy "xsa.tabletypes::YyyTableType")
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
SQL SECURITY INVOKER
AS
BEGIN
  
    CALL "xsa.procedures::InsertIntoZzz"(:zzz);
    CALL "xsa.procedures::InsertIntoYyy"(:yyy);
	    
END;

 

 

Hello,

Is it possible to call stored HANA procedure with tabletype parameters from NodeJS on XSA?
I have a procedure with tabletype parameters. Trying to call it using @sap/hdbext and passing arrays for zzz and yyy with objects with fields that exactly are in db tables but still getting error:

 

 

{
    "error": "Table parameter ZZZ is expected to be an array of objects or an object with \"table\" (mandatory) and \"schema\" (optional) properties"
}

 

 

Need some help with how to call it properly.

 

Thanks in advance,

Mikolaj

entry.title: Which way of S4 Hana system implementation is suggested, if client is new to SAP and or old to SAP?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Ref. to subject mentioned. can you through some light on it.!

Because, yesterday I have attended an interview for SAP Head position in Hyd in a product based company especially a Manufacturing industry, they were saying they are using sap from past 20 years (this is a bid wonder?), but the company is 30 years old. and recently 2 years ago they have to SAP S4 Hana system.

However still they are not happy, says that they have lot of gaps in their system after implementing SAP S4Hana, not sure, if they have implemented green field implementation (meaning from the scratch, need to build the organization into new S4 Hana ERP system, Fiori based).

And also said that, they have these concerns mentioning below: 

-1). People issue (might be their company people /business have not cooperated and or supported during migration)

-2). Data inputs have not given properly,

-3). Systems issues

feeling, all these because the work is not done properly in the first 3 phases of Activate methodology. Discover, Prepare and Explore phases were not fully utilized, meaning the activities and or task were not well taken care, is it not?

Otherwise, they have now still gaps, and the management were not happy, cause they reports or dash board are not meeting as per their expectation, due to that, management is not able to take proper decision and or they is a delay in that or lagging... resulting in that, they are not satisfied it seems. And they said that, it as implemented by a Pune based sap implementation partner.!

but one thing asked since they are old to sap 20 years, still their system is not fully stabilized.. so is it not because of something else, that is just influence of owners? because its a private limited company. One man army show, so feeling sap have developed a methodology to utilize and implement the new system for their industry for better way of digitization of their enterprise right?  And the results are as expected, provided when the companies follow better, and leverage all the best practices and implemented, right?

So, need your expert opinion, what might be the causes, best possible suggestions.!

Appreciate your expertise thoughts.!

Thanks in advance,

Regards.

Er.K.S.

entry.title: Cannot delete untransported Business Configuration custom entry, please help
entry.content:
We have SAP HANA Public Cloud in Implementation phase and in Central Business Configuration we tried to add some new company legal forms at the "Manage Legal Forms" screen.

Somehow some forms were duplicated in the list. We tried to delete the not needed ones, but we cannot delete any new entries, despite, we have not transported any of these new entries and of course they were never used.

entry.title: Anyone having trouble with your current SAP ERP , please feel free to address below, let's discuss
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

Are you facing any difficulties or obstacles with your SAP ERP system? Let's come together to share experiences, solutions, and best practices. Whether you're dealing with performance issues, customization challenges, or implementation roadblocks, we're here to support each other.

Please feel free to discuss your specific problems below. We can work together to find effective solutions and learn from each other's experiences.

Let's make SAP ERP work better for all of us!

entry.title: Database explorer, failed generating SQL based on prompt
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm trying to use the new genAI feature in SAP Build Code Database Explorer to generate SQL based on prompt.

What ever the prompt, I'm always getting the following error: "Unable to generate the SQL statement. Error from LLM: Failed to get embeddings. Try rephrasing the prompt."

entry.title: Copy data from one BTP ABAP Instance to Another BTP ABAP Instance
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How can we copy the data from one BTP ABAP system to another BTP ABAP system. 

Is there any tool available in BTP now for this use case ? 

Is there any way we can access SAP HANA Cloud system dedicated for BTP ABAP ?

Reference - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-do-a-systemcopy-from-subaccount-to-subaccount/qaq-p/12362340

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Purchase Order Release Date - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone know which CDS to get the PO release date from?

Thanks

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Vower member
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

 

My name is Melinda , and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I’m an eager and outgoing learner . On my spare time I enjoy researching the latest Ai trend a or Studying . I have a background in customer service and also Business

 

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in all area of SAP . I am in hope of finding a way to gain experience and knowledge of SAP. I’m currently a junior in College pursuing a Bachelor degree in Cybersecurity.

 

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because pursuing the SAP certification – whether it’s career growth or opportunity or getting an insight of of more technology skills .

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in networking , mentors and anything with technology !!!

 

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Melinda Lee  

College student ( Future Cyber Security Engineer)
